objective: Find native terms or exact query phrases that behave like 局头 on Xiaohongshu: searching them should open a repeatable river of party games, rules, host skills, cards, scripts, apps or series creators. Semantic resemblance alone does not qualify.

grading.A_plus: High-density ecosystem across multiple content forms or platforms; usable as a primary river mouth now.
grading.A: Repeated independent game, rule, script, card, app or creator-series results under an exact query.
grading.B: Real and productive bridge, but narrower, more institutional, or still dependent on a qualifier.
grading.C: Authentic term with weak actionable content yield; use only to discover people or context.
grading.D: Semantic lookalike, severe collision, or dead query; do not use as a primary seed.

role_like_shortlist.observed_density: YouTube recheck: 12/12 visible results were role-related; conservatively 7/12 were direct group-game tutorials, skill lessons or game libraries.
role_like_shortlist.why_it_matters: Best current single-word functional analogue by search behavior: it leads to how-to-be-a-facilitator lessons, game-organization skills and numbered series.
role_like_shortlist.caution: Broader than youth nightlife; camps, schools, buses, team building and Werewolf are mixed in.

role_like_shortlist.observed_density: Multiple university society pages, handbooks, constitutions and idea discussions; game-mechanism density is lower than event-theme density.
role_like_shortlist.why_it_matters: A genuine youth organizer role in UK university societies rather than a dictionary translation.
role_like_shortlist.caution: Institutional campus role, not a universal friend-group term.

role_like_shortlist.term: 幹事必見 + 飲み会ゲーム
role_like_shortlist.observed_density: YouTube recheck: 5/5 visible results were drinking-party games, game lists or organizer progress tips.
role_like_shortlist.why_it_matters: The bare role 幹事 is broad, but the organizer-facing title shell 幹事必見 behaves like 局头必备/局头手册.
next_hops: 飲み会 盛り上がるゲーム
role_like_shortlist.caution: Use the qualified phrase; 幹事 alone is mostly booking, budgeting and etiquette.

role_like_shortlist.observed_density: YouTube recheck: 7/7 visible results were party-game content, but only one visible title used the exact role phrase.
role_like_shortlist.why_it_matters: A promising 'drinking-game master' framing that connects directly to lesson and short-demo clusters.
role_like_shortlist.caution: Requires multi-author exact-phrase validation before promotion to a stable Korean role label.

role_like_shortlist.observed_density: Multiple cultural and academic sources confirm the shared-cup pourer/pace-controller role, but exact-search tutorials and creator series remain sparse.
role_like_shortlist.why_it_matters: One of the closest cultural roles to a person who controls a drinking circle's rhythm.
role_like_shortlist.caution: Real role, weak game-content river; alcohol and shared-cup risk.

role_like_shortlist.observed_density: YouTube recheck: 1/5 visible results directly connected the label to opening a music game; other results were host metaphors or general entertainment.
role_like_shortlist.why_it_matters: Closer than quản trò to a colloquial southern drinking-session controller, but much weaker as a content-discovery key.
role_like_shortlist.caution: Keep as cultural-role vocabulary, not the current primary game river mouth.

role_like_shortlist.observed_density: Caller tools, voice announcements, number nicknames and ticket generators are dense; YouTube recheck returned 3/3 caller/game results.
role_like_shortlist.why_it_matters: A real host-control tool river, but only for Tambola/Housie.
role_like_shortlist.caution: Narrow and cross-age; not a general Indian equivalent of 局头.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Separate logged-in runs: 술게임 게임 설명 10/10 relevant; 술게임 강의 7/7 relevant.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Explicit alcohol/19+ context; retain only safe rhythm, turn and response mechanics.

primary_river_mouths.query: juegos para la previa / juegos para previar
primary_river_mouths.observed_density: TikTok Spanish run recorded 8 relevant top-grid cards; YouTube recheck 3/3 relevant; public product directories showed 162/33 result signals plus apps and card brands.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Adult drinking and spicy-card branches require age/risk flags.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: The local pre-party word has become a multi-product card/digital brand with Eu Nunca, Pesadão, Verdade ou Desafio, Casal and Digital branches.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Alcohol and +18 variants are common.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Apps, 70+ game compendia, 1,800+ card apps, kits and college lists coexist; however the YouTube recheck returned sports warmups.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Platform-bound: do not treat the phrase as a clean YouTube seed; US alcohol age caveat.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Student lists, retail collections, multi-game kits and printables repeatedly use the exact phrase.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Use pre-drinks rather than pres as the primary query; pres collides with President/presentation on YouTube.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Localized cards, Black-culture trivia, small-party guides and interactive events recur after disambiguation.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Bare kickback collides with firearm recoil, bribery and gaming; some products are 18+.

primary_river_mouths.query: 飲み会ゲーム / 幹事必見 飲み会ゲーム
primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Game collections, rules, organizer preparation, apps and qualified organizer-facing video titles recur.
next_hops: 飲み会ゲーム 大学生
飲み会ゲーム 道具なし
primary_river_mouths.caution: Bare 盛り上げ役, 宴会部長, パリピ and 陽キャ do not produce a comparable game river.

primary_river_mouths.query: trò chơi nhậu / trò chơi bàn nhậu
primary_river_mouths.observed_density: The TikTok nhậu root outperformed the literal uống rượu phrasing; public guides expose game lists, apps, cards and host-led formats.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Alcohol-heavy; use quản trò when the goal is host skills rather than nightlife-scene content.

primary_river_mouths.query: เกมวงเหล้า / รวมเกมวงเหล้า / กติกาเกมวงเหล้า
primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Logged-in TikTok run: 8/8 top-grid cards relevant, dominated by phone aggregators, cards, truth/dare and spinners.
next_hops: เกมวงเหล้า ไม่ใช้อุปกรณ์
เกมวงเหล้า คำถาม
คำถามวงเหล้า
primary_river_mouths.caution: The role probe พิธีกรเกม produced TV/game-show MC noise on YouTube.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Logged-in TikTok permainan tongkrongan run: 8/8 relevant but commerce-heavy; the receh-riddle branch adds a dense, non-alcohol youth question river.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Filter board-game shops, cafés, videogames and gambling/slot SEO.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Logged-in Facebook Pinoy parlor games run: 4/4 relevant; YouTube qualified recheck: 6/6; inuman expands to cards, apps and local rule pages.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Parlor games are cross-age; inuman is alcohol-linked.

primary_river_mouths.query: gry imprezowe / bifor / gry na domówkę
primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Logged-in TikTok gry imprezowe run: 8/8 relevant and three near-exact creator usernames; bifor also became a six-game mobile brand.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Wodzirej and mistrz gry are false role entrances due to wedding/RPG collisions.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: A native marketplace category, Chilean creator shops, card packs and local discussion form a repeatable ecosystem.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Alcohol-focused branches require adult flags.

primary_river_mouths.query: jeux d'apéro / défis apéro / gages soirée
primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Apps, 300–400-card products, 150-card challenge boxes, rankings and rules recur; a logged-in TikTok sweep also found a strong apéro grid.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Boute-en-train and ambianceur are real role words but weak game-river queries.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: German catalogs explicitly advertise 61+ and 200+ games; rules, card/question/no-material branches and branded formats are stable.
primary_river_mouths.caution: High alcohol risk; Stimmungskanone and Spielleiter are false content entrances.

primary_river_mouths.query: giochi da bere / giochi alcolici / giochi da pre-serata
primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Apps with 1,500+ prompts, rule guides and named local formats recur; logged-in TikTok results were mixed but produced a native TV-format adaptation.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Pre-serata alone is weak; mattatore/anima della festa are semantic dead ends.

primary_river_mouths.query: juegos para la peda / juegos para precopeo
primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Local products, apps, cards and guides recur; la peda is the stronger colloquial scene root and precopeo a useful qualifier.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Adult drinking and spicy-card content is common.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Multiple current Hindi/English full scripts with openings, transitions, interaction fillers, games and hype lines; YouTube recheck returned 2/2 exact host-script results.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Highly youth-relevant, but many public results are SEO templates; verify creator-native use.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Logged-in TikTok run: 6/8 relevant, including a six-game list, local card products and game-night material; YouTube dropped the local signal and returned generic Christmas games.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Platform-specific and alcohol/nightlife-heavy; hypeman is better for people discovery than game discovery.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Localized charades, Afrikaans card decks, braai prompt decks, lawn games and local discussions recur; YouTube recheck showed generic rather than clearly braai-specific results.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Cross-age and platform-specific; some products are alcohol-linked.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Handbooks, leader training, game nights, Mafia, Family Feud and Trivia exist, but current evidence is institution-heavy rather than creator-heavy.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Needs student creator and logged-in platform validation.

primary_river_mouths.observed_density: Logged-in Pinterest run: 9/10 relevant, dominated by written paper games, festival/food/film themes and printable cards.
primary_river_mouths.caution: Predominantly adult women; retain as a mechanism and content-carrier sample, not youth slang.

terms: life and soul of the party
semantic_lookalikes_to_reject.reason: Generic idioms/personality descriptions; do not produce a repeatable game/rule/card river.
Real atmosphere-person words, but dictionary, literary, performance or generic-person noise dominates.
Music, professional-event, brand or marketing collisions overwhelm party-game tutorials.
Wedding, RPG/tabletop, television-game-show or literal-translation collisions; exact search does not open the desired youth game river.
Vibe/clown/personality labels rather than game-curation roots.
Plausible AI-generated or one-off constructions without a stable multi-author exact-search cluster.

validation_protocol: Search the exact native term on its target platform; do not begin with translated synonyms.
Record the first 20 visible results, relevant gameplay/host hits, unique creators and series accounts.
Extract recurring title shells, series numbers, cards/apps and creator self-labels from those results.
Re-search each new term verbatim; keep negative probes instead of rewriting them until something appears.
Bind every seed to a platform because the same phrase can work on TikTok and fail on YouTube.
Separate youth fit from search yield and keep alcohol/adult/cross-age flags explicit.
Promote a role word only when the bare or minimally qualified term itself produces a multi-author game-content river.
